message: Refuse pipe-to-shell installer pattern (curl|wget … | sh). Download to a file, inspect, then run.
Refuse eval. Review the command and run it directly instead.
Refuse dd writing to a device. Run manually if intentional.
Refuse mkfs. Run manually if intentional.
Refuse chmod -R 777. Use a tighter mode.
Refuse git push -f/--force. Use --force-with-lease or run manually.
Refuse git clean -fd (destructive). Inspect untracked files first.
Refuse git reset --hard to a remote/historical ref. Confirm intent and run manually.
Refuse truncate-to-absolute-path pattern (: > /...). Scope the path.
Refuse shred. Confirm intent and run manually.
